programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Blue World Ep612: Global Search for the Rare Dugongs + Cave Diving in Florida, USA
programme.desc: Blue World travels the world on a hunt for Dugongs… rare, shy animals resembling manatees that are very difficult to film. But we get lucky in the Philippines with an incredible once-in-a-lifetime encounter! Then, an amazing cave dive at Peacock Springs in Florida, where Blue World divers do their first “traverse”.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep122: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Evian, France
programme.desc: Round 3 of the UIM F1H2O World Championship Tour was held in Evian, France for a fifth consecutive year as the Grand Prix of France raced on the waters of Lac Leman ("Lake Geneva").

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep603: Paddling Jamaica
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting explores Jamaica’s stunning coastline, mountainous rivers, and epic ocean surf with his sea kayak.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep320: Kayaking the Muksu River in Tajikistan
programme.desc: World of Watersport highlights the film entitled "The Legend of Muksu", which documents spectacular whitewater kayaking of the Muksu River in Tajikistan.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Blue World Ep612: Global Search for the Rare Dugongs + Cave Diving in Florida, USA
programme.desc: Blue World travels the world on a hunt for Dugongs… rare, shy animals resembling manatees that are very difficult to film. But we get lucky in the Philippines with an incredible once-in-a-lifetime encounter! Then, an amazing cave dive at Peacock Springs in Florida, where Blue World divers do their first “traverse”.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep122: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Evian, France
programme.desc: Round 3 of the UIM F1H2O World Championship Tour was held in Evian, France for a fifth consecutive year as the Grand Prix of France raced on the waters of Lac Leman ("Lake Geneva").

programme.title: Drawn From Here
programme.desc: Drawn From Here is an exploration of professional skier Eric Pollard's processes as an athlete, product designer, and artist. The film follows the influences he draws from and chronicles a pivotal injury Pollard endured during the winter of 2013. Named Powder Magazine's "Movie of the Year.”

programme.title: After The Sky Falls
programme.desc: "After The Sky Falls" captures the skiing of Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and Pep Fujas. Two years in the making, this film beautifully documents the Nimbus crew’s approach to skiing, their focus on fun and creativity, and their desire to inspire everyday skiers.

programme.title: Unraveling - Chris Benchetler
programme.desc: Progression means something different to everyone. To Chris Benchetler, progression means evolving as a professional skier, as an artist, and as a father. It means growth, unraveling expectations, and changes over time. It means simplicity, clarity, and freedom. Filmed by director Tyler Hamlet.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 9: Kristoffer Turdell
programme.desc: In Episode 9, we encounter skier Kristoffer Turdell, two-time champion of the freeride world. Join us for this special Black Crows documentary about the animal from Gallivare, Sweden. Directed by Nikolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 10: Beau Fredlund
programme.desc: A yurt, 140 inhabitants in town, a door that opens on the northeast of Yellowstone National Park in Montana, a fireplace, a pair of skis, welcome to Beau's wild garden. a film by Nikolai Schirmer

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 11: The Jackson 9
programme.desc: Jackson Hole, Wyoming is home to some of the most epic skiing in North America. It is also home to a bunch of bohemian skiers nicknamed the Jackson 9. In Episode 11, we kick off Part One of our documentary series dedicated to these hobo shredders and beautiful souls. Directed by Nicolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 12: Nikolai Schirmer
programme.desc: He is tall, handsome, smart, sensitive and on fire while on skis. Nikolai Schirmer, skier, bohemian-movie-maker, reveals himself in this black doc where his meandering path unfolds. An itinerary full of waves and mountains where we discover a man whose heart has progressively tuned in to the rhythm of nature.

programme.title: Snowflake
programme.desc: Witness the joys and wonders of nature through the eyes of Snowflake, an eccentric Swiss skier with a life philosophy just as beautiful and perfectly unique as his namesake.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Visions
programme.desc: Starring: Nikolai Schirmer, Flo Bastien, Julien Lange, Anttu Oikonen. Directed by Joonas Mattila Supported by Black Crows, Level, Norrona, O'neil. Locations: Chamonix, Arlberg, Val d'Isere.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: WOLF
programme.desc:
Everything is back to normal... But why do we feel that we've lost something? WOLF is a feeling, about mountains and skiing.
WOLF is the new movie by Sam Favret. Sequel to the successful FLOW, made during the pandemic in Chamonix. WOLF is quite the opposite, and it makes us think about what was good last winter.
Skier: Sam Favret (IG samfavret) Directed by: Maxime Moulin (IG maximemoulin) Drone by: Hensli Sage Sound Design: Mix Mouse Voice over: Bird - Michael Shaffer Screenplay: Jerome Llado Photographer: Fabian Bodet Producer: Sam Favret
Produced by: Clustr.Films lin (IG clustrfilms)
Supported by: blackcrows DB Bollé
Special thanks : Samaya Nikolai Schirmer Sebastien Overney Simon Morice Yannick Boissenot Flo Bastien
Additional cinematography Joonas Mattila

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 1: Julien Regnier
programme.desc: In Episode 1, we meet Julien Regnier. For many years, Regnier has been a central figure in freeskiing. First, as an athlete and trick inventor, then as a connoisseur collector of skis. Today, he is a master ski shaper at Black Crows, providing the means for any trick to be performed.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 2: Yorgo Tloupas
programme.desc: In Episode 2, we meet Yorgo Tloupas, the graphic development manager and visual identity creator for Black Crows. Yorgo is a cosmopolitan artist, action-sports aficionado, cigarillo smoker, fixie pedaller, and cylinder head. He wears many hats. Above all, he is a great illuminator of oblong shapes.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 3: Minna Riihimaki
programme.desc: In Episode 3, you will encounter a Crow from the early days, Minna Riihimaki. A native of northern Europe. A passionate and lively adventurer. With contagious joy, Minna fed the Black Crows DNA. When she’s not skiing, she’s also a dentist, which is cool.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode we’ll be flying back to Europe, to watch the 2019 Formula Kite European Championships in Italy. Taking place in the Mediterranean track, Oristano Gulf welcomes kiteboarding in an event that will be as plastic free as possible. For all the athletes from the 22 countries participating, anticipation is high as this is the 4th major event for athletes in less than two months.

programme.title: When God Gets Ready
programme.desc: People label, but God names. You don’t have to chase identity or earn worth, because you’ve always been called, loved, and set apart for something more.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: This Might Be My God Moment
programme.desc: Are you standing over a situation that’s too big for you? If you feel like your hope, logic, and options are at a dead end, pay attention because this might be your “my God moment.”

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.
